vBRIEFInfo.description: Scaffold generated by deft-directive-swarm Phase 0 from GitHub issue #578. Full acceptance criteria live in the referenced GitHub issue body.

plan.title: deft/SKILL.md os metadata excludes windows (contradicts #568 Windows CI and skill Platform Detection)

narratives.Overview: `deft/SKILL.md` frontmatter declares `os: ["darwin", "linux"]` — windows is missing. This contradicts #568's `windows-task-dispatch` CI matrix, explicit Windows platform-detection tables in multiple skills, and Windows-specific code in migrate_vbrief.py. Fix: add `"windows"` to the os array (preferred) OR remove the field entirely; add a regression test in `tests/content/` scanning every `SKILL.md` for an `os` frontmatter key and asserting that if present, the array contains darwin, linux, and windows. See GitHub issue #578 for full context, options, and acceptance criteria.

references.title: Issue #578: deft/SKILL.md os metadata excludes windows
